appraisal_events.evidence: « M. de Vaugoubert ... parut incertain. ... La carrière diplomatique ... l'avait voué ... à la chasteté ... [il] avait perdu la perspicacité spéciale ... n'arrivait même plus à reconnaître ceux qui ... étaient au fond ses pareils. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents Vaugoubert as timid and deprived of the social ‘perspicacity’ that would allow him to recognize his peers, which diminishes him before the world and in the exchange with Charlus.

status_effects.explanation: He appears diminished by his uncertainty and the loss of ‘perspicacity’, set in an unfavorable contrast with Charlus.
